extra.reason: PR #404 opened against Kb2uka/openhpsdr-zeus develop

Settings now expose the new display scale, TX fidelity, hardware keying, supply, network, and user I/O diagnostics surfaces; verified with typecheck, focused tests, full frontend tests, production build, and browser smoke.
Reconfigured Beads Dolt remote from DoltHub API to GitHub git+https origin and verified bd dolt push succeeds.
Implemented protective RX-chain AGC hold and recoverable diagnostics capability polling; verified with focused Smart NR tests, frontend typecheck, full frontend Vitest, and frontend production build.
Implemented RX audio-path diagnostics, refined RX meter AGC trim classification from live diagnostics, and verified with focused backend tests, API tests, and frontend typecheck.
Refined TX egress diagnostics so idle prior P2 traffic reports as post-TX history/standby while active stale P2 counters remain verify faults; verified with focused TxEgressHealthDiagnosticsTests.

Refined TX audio-path diagnostics so idle host with prior P2 activity and ring pressure reports post-tx-ring-pressure instead of generic idle pressure; active keyed ring pressure remains tx-ring-pressure. Verified focused TX diagnostics tests with isolated output.

Added Smart NR runtime alignment fields to /api/dsp/nr-condition, including expected WDSP mode, aligned boolean, status, and recommendation; exposed them in the Hardware Diagnostics DSP scene view; verified backend service/endpoint tests and frontend client normalization.
Auto AGC no longer lowers effective AGC-T solely because WDSP AGC is cutting when ADC headroom is clean; diagnostics now report clean-headroom AGC cut as normalization.
Exposed derived TXA density/headroom diagnostics in API, frontend, and focused tests.
Clarified RX audio and squelch diagnostics by separating backend adaptive gate state from WDSP fixed SQL, adding gate-source/open-known fields, and warning on silent audio under fixed SQL.
TX Fidelity header polished and verified with focused frontend test/build.

Added derived RX listenability diagnostics that correlate RXA meters, final audio, and squelch mode; surfaced status/tone/blocker/recommendation in Hardware Diagnostics with backend and frontend coverage.
Restored Beads origin/sync.remote to the iamexemplar owner so Beads sync targets the same fork owner as Git origin.

Implemented /api/radio/pa-thermal, frontend Hardware Diagnostics panel support, and focused backend/frontend coverage. Verified with targeted PA thermal tests, full Zeus.Server.Tests using an isolated ZEUS_PREFS_PATH, Zeus.Contracts.Tests, zeus-web client tests, and zeus-web production build.
Implemented G2 sensor mapping diagnostics endpoint, hardware settings surface, and tests.
Completed NR5/SPNR diagnostics export, backend/frontend surfacing, tests, and live P2 validation with full WDSP wisdom.

Completed NR5 coherent-ridge weak-signal enhancement: native SPNR now learns phase coherence/ridge protection and adaptive floor pressure; schema 2 diagnostics expose coherence/ridge/floor/range; managed/frontend/tests updated; native, .NET, frontend, and live P2 diagnostics validation passed.
Added G2 firmware option and WDSP filter architecture diagnostics/settings surfaces.

Completed NR5 deep dynamic-range extraction pass: native SPNR now applies stronger bounded deep-floor pressure to non-coherent bins, uses localized signal confidence to gate post-NR AGC, exports deep diagnostics, updates managed/frontend schema v3, and adds synthetic noise-only gate coverage. Native build, .NET build, WDSP NR sweep, server diagnostics tests, frontend tests, and frontend build passed; live P2 validation was not run because the existing desktop Zeus process owned the radio socket.
Added RX dynamic-range advisor diagnostics and Settings surface.
Implemented Signal Intelligence auto-notch detection and waterfall Pop dynamic-range refinements; targeted frontend/server tests pass.
Added receiver bandwidth and DDC utilization diagnostics.

Live NR5 validation complete: isolated backend loaded updated WDSP after adding FFTW runtime DLLs, connected P2 at 384 kHz, collected schema 3 NR5 samples to tmp/nr5-deep-live/nr5-v3-samples.json, then restored desktop P2 session with NR5 active.
Added G2 ADC dither/random settings and Protocol-2 wire mapping.
Added TX mic uplink diagnostics to /api/tx/diag and Settings telemetry.
Auto-notch now verifies repeated sightings, refines stable tracks with hysteresis, and holds verified notches through brief missed samples. Frontend tests and build pass.
Implemented workspace tab dock and detached window support
Fixed RX audio gain discontinuities and verified focused RX leveler tests; separate NR5 diagnostics failures tracked in zeus-ciu.

Refined NR5/SPNR signal-only gating: stricter phase/spectral coherence learner, localized FFT-bin island support, deeper stochastic-bin suppression, lower weak-signal AGC gate threshold, buried-tone/noise-only regression coverage, design note update. Verified native WDSP rebuild, focused NR5 tests, broader NoiseReduction/WdspNativeLoader slice, and non-disruptive live NR5 diagnostics.
Added frontend RX playback diagnostics to /api/radio/diagnostics and Settings telemetry; expanded DSP filter catalog to show the full WDSP planning ladder.

Cleared the private TX-monitor RXA audio ring on monitor toggles so old queued audition samples cannot replay. The live audition path remains post-TXA and unfiltered: Audio Suite plus WDSP TX processing such as CFC/compression/ALC/bandpass/CFIR. Verified Zeus.Dsp builds cleanly; full server test rerun is currently blocked by stale OpenhpsdrZeus wwwroot asset entries unrelated to this DSP change.
Auto notch detector now runs from ANF state, the separate waterfall AUTO control is removed, legacy setting is inert, and targeted frontend tests/typecheck pass.

Refined NR5 from live diagnostics: added sparse-band prior from full-band FFT evidence, stronger non-island floor pressure, tighter broadband protection, lower protected-island gain floor, coherent/salient AGC lift, and post-NR dynamicRangeDb based on effective floor. Verified native WDSP rebuild, focused NR5 tests, broader NoiseReduction/WdspNativeLoader slice, and live P2 diagnostics on 192.168.1.25:1024 with NR5 active.

Implemented Phase 1 WDSP parity audit foundation: added lineage/parity analysis doc and deterministic DSP benchmark fixture/metrics harness with tests. Verification: DSP test project passed; benchmark-harness filter passed; full solution build passed with alternate output because the normal app output was locked by running OpenhpsdrZeus process 41072.
Exposed persisted G2 ADC1/RX2 step attenuator control and diagnostics through existing radio options surfaces.
Fixed by running the managed VST bridge probe through the published OpenhpsdrZeus executable instead of PowerShell reflection; verified positive and missing-native payload checks locally.

Stabilized NR5 post-normalizer pumping: added smoothed AGC RMS envelope, slower gate decay/hang, slower gain recovery, compressed gate drive, and capped NR5 makeup gain. Verified native WDSP rebuild, focused NR5 tests, broader NoiseReduction/WdspNativeLoader slice, and live P2 diagnostics with NR5 active on 192.168.1.25:1024. Live agcGain span dropped from 2.78 before fix to 0.82 in the post-fix sample.

Implemented read-only live DSP diagnostics summary via DspLiveDiagnosticsDto/DspLiveDiagnosticsService and /api/dsp/live-diagnostics; advertised telemetry/control paths in hardware diagnostics; documented the live readiness surface; verified with dotnet build Zeus.slnx --no-restore, full Zeus.Server.Tests, and Zeus.Contracts.Tests.
Completed runtime sample-rate visibility by making wideband DDC control diagnostics explicit and aligning display refill timing with the 1.536 MHz G2 ladder.
New user-created workspaces now seed an explicit empty layout

Implemented read-only external DSP candidate catalog for RNNoise, DeepFilterNet, SpeexDSP, and WebRTC APM; embedded it in /api/dsp/live-diagnostics; exposed /api/dsp/external-engine-candidates; advertised catalog paths in hardware diagnostics; documented opt-in bakeoff gates. Verified with isolated-output dotnet build Zeus.slnx --no-restore, focused server diagnostics tests, full Zeus.Server.Tests, and Zeus.Contracts.Tests.

NR5 leveler now uses a confirmed-signal constant RMS target, 48x makeup ceiling, weak-island spectral protection, slew-limited gain, and final RMS limiter; tested with NR5 DSP slice, broader DSP slice, and live P2 diagnostics.

Implemented read-only DSP benchmark acceptance catalog with RX, TX, PureSignal-safe, frontend-scene, and WDSP lifecycle scenarios; exposed /api/dsp/benchmark-plan; surfaced benchmark plan endpoint, scenario count, next scenario IDs, and global acceptance gates in /api/dsp/live-diagnostics; advertised benchmark-plan paths in hardware diagnostics; documented the route. Verified with isolated-output focused server diagnostics tests, dotnet build Zeus.slnx --no-restore, Zeus.Contracts.Tests, and full Zeus.Server.Tests.

Implemented read-only DSP benchmark capture manifest: added manifest DTOs, DspBenchmarkCaptureManifestService, /api/dsp/benchmark-capture-manifest, hardware diagnostics discovery paths, roadmap documentation, and service/endpoint tests. Verified with isolated-output focused diagnostics tests, dotnet build Zeus.slnx --no-restore, Zeus.Contracts.Tests, and full Zeus.Server.Tests.

Implemented read-only DSP modernization evidence snapshot: added DspModernizationEvidenceSnapshotDto, DspModernizationEvidenceSnapshotService, /api/dsp/modernization-snapshot, hardware diagnostics discovery paths, roadmap documentation, and service/endpoint tests. Also made the G2 topology notes explicitly include ADC2 ground-on-TX wording so the diagnostics surface matches the manual audit. Verified with isolated-output focused diagnostics tests, focused G2 topology tests, full Zeus.Server.Tests, Zeus.Contracts.Tests, and dotnet build Zeus.slnx --no-restore.
Auto notch detector now accepts strong coherent wide blockers and edge-visible blockers while preserving broad real-signal rejection; targeted tests and typecheck pass.

Stabilized NR5/SPNR diagnostics and added live DSP/G2 hardware-potential diagnostics. Verified full dotnet solution tests, full Vitest suite, frontend build, and Browser smoke for Settings > Hardware.

Implemented tools/capture-dsp-modernization-bundle.ps1 for read-only DSP modernization evidence capture with configurable BaseUrl/OutputRoot/Label, PlanOnly dry-run, endpoint status handling, bundle-index.json, and README output. Added captures/ to .gitignore and documented usage in the WDSP lineage/benchmark roadmap. Verified PlanOnly output, PowerShell parser validation, failure-path bundle/index creation with ContinueOnError, git diff --check, and isolated-output dotnet build Zeus.slnx --no-restore.

NR5 anti-fade pass: added held level-drive state, slowed gate/envelope/gain motion, decoupled limiter from long-term AGC gain, softened weak-island spectral gain drops, rebuilt WDSP, verified NR5 and broader DSP slices, and sampled live P2 diagnostics with squelch/ANF isolated.
Added and smoke-tested the DSP modernization bundle validator.

Implemented optional artifact-manifest validation for DSP modernization bundles. Verified parser OK, git diff --check, synthetic complete/missing/no-manifest bundle behavior, and isolated dotnet build Zeus.slnx --no-restore.
Added compact bottom-right workspace Add Panel button

Added tools/new-dsp-artifact-manifest.ps1 to generate artifact-manifest.template.json or artifact-manifest.json from benchmark-capture-manifest.json, updated capture README text and WDSP roadmap workflow. Verified parser OK, diff check, synthetic scaffold plus strict validator pass/fail behavior, and isolated dotnet build Zeus.slnx --no-restore.

Extended validate-dsp-modernization-bundle.ps1 to validate files referenced by audio/spectrum/trace artifact index JSON, report referenced-file counts, and keep artifact ok=false when indexed evidence is missing. Documented the index format. Verified parser OK, diff check, synthetic missing/pass indexed-file behavior, and isolated dotnet build Zeus.slnx --no-restore.

Extended validate-dsp-modernization-bundle.ps1 so indexed audio/spectrum/trace artifacts must cover required scenarioIds, reports scenario coverage and missing scenario counts, and documents index scenarioId requirements. Verified parser OK, diff check, synthetic missing/pass scenario coverage behavior, and isolated dotnet build Zeus.slnx --no-restore.
Implemented viewport-bound workspace sizing and verified npm build plus browser metrics at 1280x720.
Fixed by clearing waterfall history when the effective value domain changes between RX dB, Signal Pop, and TX dB; added Waterfall regression coverage.

Extended artifact index validation to enforce benchmark-plan comparison coverage per scenario, including aliases and candidate-under-test derivation for NR5/external candidates. Updated docs. Verified parser OK, diff check, synthetic missing/pass comparison behavior, and isolated dotnet build Zeus.slnx --no-restore.
Fixed TX Fidelity advisor advisory rows to reserve two-line space, preventing recommendation text updates from changing the panel height.

Extended validate-dsp-modernization-bundle.ps1 to validate offline-fixture-metrics scenario/comparison metric coverage and explicit gate outcomes from benchmark-plan requiredMetrics. Documented the metrics JSON format. Verified parser OK, diff check, synthetic missing/pass metrics+gate behavior, and isolated dotnet build Zeus.slnx --no-restore.
Fixed: TX start now clears Audio Suite audition/TX Monitor, with server and frontend store coverage.

Implemented strict DSP bundle hardware evidence validation for G2 target alignment and connected G2-class diagnostics; verified with parser, synthetic pass/fail bundles, diff check, isolated build, and dotnet test.

Added offline DSP fixture metric comparison report tooling with bundle-mode resolution, candidate-vs-current-Zeus/Thetis deltas, Markdown summary, and regression gate; verified with parser, synthetic pass/fail and bundle-mode checks, diff check, and isolated build.

Strict bundle validation now requires the generated DSP fixture metric comparison report for artifact acceptance, validates its readiness/regression/baseline/candidate/gate counters, scaffolds the report in new artifact manifests, and documents the acceptance gate. Verified with parser checks, strict synthetic pass/fail bundles, diff check, and isolated build.
Disabled workspace grid compaction and made the grid surface fill sparse detached workspaces

Added a read-only DSP benchmark metric semantics catalog endpoint, capture-bundle support, validator catalog coverage checks, compare-tool catalog consumption, docs, and focused tests. Verified with parser checks, catalog-consumption synthetic, validator missing/present catalog synthetic, targeted server tests, diff check, and isolated build.
Implemented read-only live DSP runtime evidence in diagnostics and verified with full solution build/tests.
Fixed TX station profile apply so unbound profiles apply their Audio Suite route and master-bypass intent; added frontend tests and verified build/test/lint.
Added read-only live DSP diagnostics watch/export tool, optional JSONL evidence artifact support, docs, and validation; verified with script checks plus full build/tests.
Added live diagnostics trace comparison tool, optional comparison artifact integration, validator support, docs, and verified with script checks plus full build/tests.

Fixed and verified.

TX/audio profile activation now runs outside the TX profile panel and is awaited by the first MOX/TUNE/PTT/key preflight before TX is keyed, so the selected station profile and saved Audio Suite profile are applied before first transmission.

VST meter logic was tightened so off-air live preview degraded/pass-through blocks no longer overwrite the last real VST engine OUT meter, while on-air TX still records honest pass-through meters if the engine degrades.

Live verification after rebuild/relaunch on 127.0.0.1:6061:
- Connected to 192.168.1.25:1024 at 48 kHz.
- Audio Suite route: vst, engineActive: true, masterBypassed: false.
- TX fidelity policy: essb, Audio Suite profile: VST x1.
- State mic gain -4 dB and leveler max 11 dB match the essb station profile.
- LSB TX filter is signed correctly: -4000..-40 Hz.
- 90 Audio Suite chain meter samples while connected: OUT min -43.5 dB, max -34.0 dB, 0 near-full-scale samples (> -6 dB). The prior fast OUT jump to about -1 dB did not recur.

Checks:
- Focused frontend TX profile tests: 16 passed.
- Frontend production build: passed.
- Frontend lint: passed with existing warnings.
- OpenhpsdrZeus backend build: passed 0 warnings / 0 errors.

Full-suite caveat: current dirty worktree has unrelated verification blockers filed as zeus-4lbg (Waterfall Vitest expectation and DisplayIntelligenceSettingsDto test constructor compile error), so full Vitest/dotnet test suites are not fully green in this worktree.
Implemented GPU-side Pop Relief waterfall smoothing/height lighting with persisted controls; targeted frontend tests, server display-intelligence tests, diff check, and frontend build pass.
Implemented one-second signal meter peak hold with frontend tests

Made Pop Relief visibly stronger with local contrast, rim highlights, cast shadows, stronger defaults, and updated the served debug webroot; diagnosed screenshot crash as duplicate LAN HTTPS :6443 bind and guarded desktop/server startup; tests/build/live bundle checks pass.

Implemented read-only WDSP NativeMethods/source/binary export audit, integrated it as required modernization artifact, and verified audit/scaffold/validator plus dotnet build/test. Current audit intentionally reports one readiness blocker: SetTXACFCOMPprofile managed/native parameter mismatch.

Fixed SetTXACFCOMPprofile P/Invoke to match the vendored WDSP 5-parameter ABI, removed the stale Q-pointer call/comment, reran the native symbol audit to readyForReview=true, and verified Zeus.Dsp.Tests plus full solution build/test.

Made Pop Relief unmistakable in the live waterfall: stronger GPU bevel/halo shader, legacy 48/42 relief migration to 92/64, persisted live prefs updated, focused frontend/backend tests and builds passed.

Added live DSP diagnostics scenario matrix runner, optional trace-index artifact integration, validation support for artifact-level comparisonIds, docs, and tests. Verified focused server tests plus full solution build/test.

Refined NR5 weak-signal recovery and anti-fade behavior: added signal-evidence-driven AGC recovery and bounded fast makeup, tightened narrow-tone false-open guard, deployed tested WDSP DLL, and captured live diagnostics at tmp/nr5-final-weak-recovery-live.json showing output span 21.3 dB over a 25.9 dB input span with no -60 dBFS collapse. Tests: NoiseReductionTests.Wdsp_Nr5 4 passed; NoiseReductionTests|WdspNativeLoaderTests 138 passed / 120 skipped.

Added WDSP-backed synthetic NR5 weak-signal fixture regression tests covering weak carrier, SSB-like speech, fading carrier, impulse noise with NB off/on, and noise-only stability. Fixed SPNR weak-signal preservation for stationary CW/voice-like content with narrow-tone protection and diagnostics-gated dry recovery. Rebuilt the Win x64 test runtime DLL and verified native exports, full DSP tests, full solution build, and full solution tests.
